    Class that stores attributes for a booking

    Screen Controller for the Bookings Overview screen Shows the list of all bookings and a tab for that booking's events

    Screen Controller for Calendar Shows diary notes and venue availability

    Class that stores attributes for a contract

    Screen Controller class for the ContractPage screen Shows all of a contract's details

    Screen Controller class to display a list of all contracts

    Screen Controller for the Daily Sheet screen Shows all events occurring today

    Screen Controller for the Diary Lets the user write notes and store them in the database

    Class that stores attributes for a Diary Note
    Event
    Class that stores attributes for an Event
    ICalendar
    Interface for the Calendar
    IEvent
    Interface for events

    Class to store attributes about an invoice

    Screen Controller class for the InvoicePage screen Shows all the details about a selected invoice

    Screen Controller class for the Invoices screen Shows a list of all invoices

    Interface for Seating Configurations

    Screen Controller for the New Booking screen Lets the user add a new booking and save it to the database

    Class which stores attributes about an Event's Seating Configuration

    UsageChart
    Screen Controller for the Usage Chart Shows the user events within a 3-week timeframe, showing information about each event through clickable, coloured bars
